title: Sprinkles's Custommons
description: My assortment of Custom fakemon accumulated over the time
body:
## Datapack with a custom assortment of a handful of Fakemon made to be used publicly on Cobblemon and their servers.

Future additions will be added to this roster throughout the times.

This Pack includes my custom Fakemon such as

- Arachlidia
>   A Bug type Isopod designed after the Roli-Poli's, roaming the forests. (No it sadly cant roll into a ball)
- Bathyrachnaut
>   A Bug/Dark Isopod, occuring in the evolution after exposing an Arachlidia to the pressure to the Deep Dark Seas.
> Known for their go to tough behaviour.
- Bathyrachaqua (Very creative name, thanks)
>   A Bug/Water Isopod, occuring in the evolution after the domestication of an Arachlidia with tons of Friendship and a fitting Treat.
> [Model and Texture based after this wonderful individual](https://www.twitch.tv/arachnarmidillidia)

- Terraster
>   Ground/Psychic Clown like Puppet, legends spoke about these guys, to only roam near where the most precious minerals lie.
- Terruppeteer
>   Ground/Psychic Crazed Puppeteer, legends foretold, its due to their past in History, that these guys generally don't even want to live near the humankind.

- Sidhertz
>   Fairy/Electric The Mischevious Electric Gremlin, legends told, these little rascals were known to be most fiercest on the surface in their times, yet their hunger for gold lead them to where the matieral isnt scarce of.


## Incase of Models and Textures not loading
Please try copying and adding the folder (whole or just the assets folder) into your own Resourcepacks/Server enforced Resourcepacks

**Incase of any sights of missuse of the License or wishes for exceptions, please contact me**
